features: Fresh Scent: Experience a invigorating, fresh fragrance that's perfect for everyday wear
Travel Size: Ideal for on-the-go use, this 100ml bottle fits easily into your bag or pocket
Cruelty-Free: Enjoy your fragrance knowing it's been produced without animal testing
Long-Lasting: Our Eau de Toilette provides a lasting scent that keeps you fresh throughout the day
Perfect Gift: This set is beautifully presented, making it an excellent gift for any occasion
description: Product description Indulge in the captivating scent of Lion's Den, a fresh and invigorating Eau de Toilette designed exclusively for men. This 100ml travel-sized bottle is perfect for on-the-go grooming, making it an ideal gift for any occasion. The cruelty-free formula is free from animal-derived materials, ensuring a conscious and responsible choice. Apply a small amount to pulse points, allowing it to dry naturally for a long-lasting, refreshing fragrance. Ingredients alcohol aqua water etc Directions Spray on pulse points and allow to dry naturally See more
